whatMustBeOnSite: Current hood suppression or service report.
Certificate of Occupancy checklist items or upfit inspection packet if applicable.
Grease trap maintenance and hauler records.
Access to labeled fire-safety systems and panels.
commonFailureReasons: Blocked access or unlabeled fire-safety systems.
rescheduleMethod: Call Charlotte Fire Prevention at 704-336-2101 to request another inspection.
penaltyOrEscalation: Missing records can delay occupancy approval and trigger follow-up inspection.
